headline: 14 Ethereum mainnet contracts catalogued across core restaking, governance multisigs, and token; ProxyAdmin and StrategyFactory addresses not confirmed; DeFiPunkd and Etherscan direct reads blocked.

findings.text: Etherscan direct fetch blocked; search grounding returned Etherscan name-tagged addresses for Community Multisig (0xFEA47018D632A77bA579846c840d5706705Dc598), Operations Multisig (0xbe1685c81aa44ff9fb319dd389addd9374383e90), Pauser Multisig (0x5050389572f2d220ad927CcbeA0D406831012390), Executor Multisig (0x369e6F597e22EaB55fFb173C6d9cD234BD699111), EIGEN Token (0xec53bf9167f50cdeb3ae105f56099aaab9061f83). Addresses confirmed via Etherscan name-tag labels in search results.

Canonical deployed-contracts doc at https://docs.eigencloud.xyz/eigenlayer/developers/concepts/eigenlayer-contracts/deployed-contracts (direct fetch failed; URL confirmed live by search grounding). Doc states addresses are sourced from eigenlayer-contracts/README.md#deployments. GitHub README search grounding returned full mainnet table: DelegationManager (0x39053D51B77DC0d36036Fc1fCc8Cb819df8Ef37A), StrategyManager (0x858646372CC42E1A627fcE94aa7A7033e7CF075A), EigenPodManager (0x91E677b07F7AF907ec9a428aafA9fc14a0d3A338), AVSDirectory (0x135dda560e946695d6f155dacafc6f1f25c1f5af), RewardsCoordinator (0x7750d328b314EfFa365A0402CcfD489B80B0adda), PermissionController (0x25E5F8B1E7aDf44518d35D5B2271f114e081f0E5), AllocationManager (0x948a420b8CC1d6BFd0B6087C2E7c344a2CD0bc39). All proxies are TUP (TransparentUpgradeableProxy).

Audit links page (docs.eigencloud.xyz/eigenlayer/security/audits) fetch blocked. Blog post (blog.eigencloud.xyz/eigenlayer-stage-1-mainnet-launch/) confirmed audits: ConsenSys Diligence (2023-03), Sigma Prime (2023), Code4rena audit contest (2023-04). Audit PDF direct URLs were not retrievable; audit firms and dates recorded from blog evidence.

GitHub org Layr-Labs confirmed as protocol.github. eigenlayer-contracts README (github.com/Layr-Labs/eigenlayer-contracts) returned full mainnet contract table via search grounding. Raw file and script/configs directory fetch were blocked. No Foundry broadcast JSON or hardhat-deploy files were accessible directly; contract addresses sourced from README table via search grounding. Commit SHA not pinnable (raw fetch blocked).

Protocol.chains = Ethereum only; no multi-chain enumeration required. Note: GitHub README mentions Base as a destination chain for multichain protocol (AVS stake transport) but states standard core protocol functionality (restaking, slashing) does not exist on Base. Scope remains Ethereum mainnet.

StrategyFactory address mentioned in GitHub README search result as the factory for ERC20 strategies (beacon proxy pattern). StrategyFactory proxy address not recovered from fetched sources (table was truncated after AllocationManager in search result). Recorded in unknowns.

Role taxonomy applied: DelegationManager/StrategyManager/EigenPodManager/AVSDirectory/RewardsCoordinator/PermissionController/AllocationManager classified as 'pool' (core protocol entry/exit contracts); Community Multisig and Operations Multisig as 'multisig'; Executor Multisig as 'multisig'; Pauser Multisig as 'guardian'; Timelock (0xC06Fd4F821eaC1fF1ae8067b36342899b57BAa2d) as 'timelock'; EIGEN token as 'token'. actor_class set to 'unknown' where on-chain bytecode was not directly read.

All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to fetched URLs: blog post fetch for StrategyManager/EigenPodManager/Community Multisig; search-grounded GitHub README for DelegationManager/AVSDirectory/RewardsCoordinator/PermissionController/AllocationManager; search-grounded Etherscan name-tags for Operations/Pauser/Executor multisigs; Eigen Foundation governance docs for timelock addresses.

rationale.verdict: Discovery run walked four corpora: EigenCloud blog (direct fetch), GitHub README (search grounding), Etherscan name-tag search (search grounding), and Eigen Foundation governance docs (search grounding). 14 Ethereum mainnet contract and admin addresses catalogued. No on-chain API reads succeeded (DeFiPunkd and Etherscan blocked); grading_basis set to 'mixed' (off-chain docs + search-grounded Etherscan labels). ProxyAdmin address, StrategyFactory proxy, and EigenPodBeacon remain undiscovered and are recorded in unknowns for the next run.

evidence.shows: Mainnet deployment of StrategyManager (0x858646372CC42E1A627fcE94aa7A7033e7CF075A) and EigenPodManager (0x91E677b07F7AF907ec9a428aafA9fc14a0d3A338); Community Multisig address (0xFEA47018D632A77bA579846c840d5706705Dc598) as 9-of-13; Operations Multisig described as 3-of-5 with 10-day timelock; Pauser Multisig as 1-of-9; audit firms ConsenSys Diligence and Sigma Prime; Immunefi bug bounty ($2M); governance architecture described.

Derived from search grounding of README: Mainnet Ethereum table listing DelegationManager proxy 0x39053D51B77DC0d36036Fc1fCc8Cb819df8Ef37A, StrategyManager proxy 0x858646372CC42E1A627fcE94aa7A7033e7CF075A, EigenPodManager proxy 0x91E677b07F7AF907ec9a428aafA9fc14a0d3A338, AVSDirectory proxy 0x135dda560e946695d6f155dacafc6f1f25c1f5af, RewardsCoordinator proxy 0x7750d328b314EfFa365A0402CcfD489B80B0adda, PermissionController proxy 0x25E5F8B1E7aDf44518d35D5B2271f114e081f0E5, AllocationManager proxy 0x948a420b8CC1d6BFd0B6087C2E7c344a2CD0bc39; all use TUP (TransparentUpgradeableProxy).
Derived from search grounding: Etherscan name-tags EigenLayer Community Multisig at 0xFEA47018D632A77bA579846c840d5706705Dc598.
Derived from search grounding: Etherscan name-tags EigenLayer Operations Multisig at 0xbe1685c81aa44ff9fb319dd389addd9374383e90.
Derived from search grounding: Etherscan name-tags EigenLayer Pauser Multisig at 0x5050389572f2d220ad927CcbeA0D406831012390.
Derived from search grounding: Etherscan name-tags EigenLayer Executor Multisig at 0x369e6F597e22EaB55fFb173C6d9cD234BD699111.
Derived from search grounding: Etherscan name-tags EigenLayer EIGEN Token at 0xec53bf9167f50cdeb3ae105f56099aaab9061f83.

Derived from search grounding: Primary timelock address 0xC06Fd4F821eaC1fF1ae8067b36342899b57BAa2d (10-day delay); bEIGEN timelock 0x738130bc8eade1bc65a9c056dea636835896bc53; Operations Multisig described as 3-of-6 operated by Eigen Labs; Protocol Council as 3-of-5 Gnosis Safe executing upgrades through timelock; Community Multisig as 9-of-13 emergency actor.

Derived from search grounding: Corroborates DelegationManager proxy 0x3905...f37A; confirms upgrade path: TimelockController (10d delay) → EigenLayerOwningMultisig → EigenLayerProxyAdmin for all core contracts; no upgrade delay on DelegationManager and StrategyManager listed as a known risk.
Derived from search grounding: Canonical deployed-contracts doc for EigenLayer, referencing eigenlayer-contracts/README.md#deployments as authoritative source for mainnet and testnet addresses.

unknowns: D1-offchain: Etherscan direct fetch blocked; name-tag addresses sourced from search-grounded snippets only, not a full explorer page body.
D2-offchain: docs.eigencloud.xyz direct fetch blocked; deployed-contracts page confirmed to exist but content read via search grounding only.

D3: Audit PDF links at docs.eigencloud.xyz/eigenlayer/security/audits unreachable (direct fetch blocked); audit firm names and dates sourced from blog post only, not from the audit PDFs themselves. Specific report URLs unknown.
D4: GitHub raw file and script/configs directory fetch blocked; commit SHA for README table not pinnable; StrategyFactory proxy address not recovered (table truncated in search snippet).
D6: StrategyFactory proxy address not confirmed from any fetched source; StrategyBeacon (EigenPodBeacon) address not recovered.
D6: EmissionsController proxy address (0x619F988b4EA2f896ED068d84cE6F52550d6acE84 mentioned in one search snippet) not confirmed from a cleanly fetched source; not included in admin_addresses.
D7: ProxyAdmin address (EigenLayerProxyAdmin label seen on L2Beat but address not extracted) not confirmed; not included in admin_addresses.
D8: DeFiPunkd /api/contract/read and /api/safe/owners endpoints blocked for all candidate addresses; no on-chain view-method reads performed this run.

admin_addresses.role: pool (StrategyManager proxy — primary entry/exit for LST restaking)
multisig (Operations Multisig — 3-of-6, routine upgrades via timelock)
multisig (Executor Multisig — automated execution role only)

protocol_metadata.about: EigenCloud (operating as EigenLayer) is a restaking protocol on Ethereum that allows users to stake Native ETH, Liquid Staking Tokens (LSTs), the EIGEN token, or any ERC20 token into EigenLayer smart contracts, extending Ethereum's cryptoeconomic security to new services called Autonomous Verifiable Services (AVSs). Users deposit into strategy contracts via the StrategyManager or create EigenPods for native ETH restaking, receiving restaked shares they can delegate to Operators who run AVS software. Withdrawals are subject to a 14-day escrow period enforced by the DelegationManager. EigenCloud is the developer-tooling and cloud-compute layer built on top of EigenLayer, offering verifiable off-chain compute (EigenCompute), deterministic LLM inference (EigenAI), and unified AVS tooling.
